title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. subcymigera
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. subcymigera is a subspecies of the plant Pilosella piloselloides, commonly known as the hairy hawk's-beard or false hawk's-beard, a flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella piloselloides subsp. subcymigera include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
